privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the official SampleDivesV2.ssrf file containing real dive logs. The target is confirmed to be Dive #4, which the XML file shows took place on 2010-12-05 at Sund Rock, Hoodsport, WA. The verifier strictly requires the exact target note: 'Spotted a giant Pacific octopus near the rocky outcrop at 10 meters depth. Visibility approximately 8 meters. Water temperature was cold at 8 degrees Celsius.' to be saved in the dive's notes field.
